---
title: "danger_room.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\danger_room.py"
loc: 148
complexity: 18
logic_score: 0.50
style_score: 3.65
intel_score: 6.26
overall_score: 2.89
---

## Intent
The `danger_room.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on DangerRoom, __init__, _read_ledger, _scaffold_test, _clean_markdown, _human_review, _commit_test, execute, main. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via DangerRoom, __init__, _read_ledger, _scaffold_test, _clean_markdown, _human_review, _commit_test, execute, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [argparse](file://argparse)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [json](file://json)
- [logging](file://logging)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)

### Exports
- `DangerRoom`
- `__init__`
- `_read_ledger`
- `_scaffold_test`
- `_clean_markdown`
- `_human_review`
- `_commit_test`
- `execute`
- `main`
